steps.title: Identify hours per workshop type from the coefficients
steps.content:
In the equation $12x + 18y = 96$, each coefficient represents the hours for that workshop type.

The coefficient 12 (paired with $x$, in-person workshops) means each in-person workshop is 12 hours.

The coefficient 18 (paired with $y$, remote workshops) means each remote workshop is 18 hours.

steps.title: Calculate the difference
steps.content: Subtract the in-person hours from the remote hours: $$18 - 12 = 6$$ Each remote training workshop takes 6 more hours than each in-person training workshop.
